brand_archetype: The Performance Pro mixed with Jewel & Luxury

theme_strategy.rationale: Ultra-premium, cinematic, moody aesthetic required by the problem statement.

rules.h1: font-cinzel text-5xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl tracking-tighter uppercase font-black text-[#E6F7FF]
rules.h2: font-cinzel text-4xl md:text-5xl tracking-tight uppercase font-bold text-[#E6F7FF]
rules.h3: font-cinzel text-2xl md:text-3xl tracking-tight uppercase font-semibold text-[#E6F7FF]
rules.body: font-inter text-base md:text-lg leading-relaxed text-[#E6F7FF] opacity-80
rules.overline: font-inter text-xs md:text-sm font-bold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#22D3EE]

visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: relative overflow-hidden before:absolute before:inset-0 before:rounded-xl before:border before:border-transparent before:[background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#22D3EE,transparent)_border-box] before:[mask-composite:exclude]

marketing_pages.strategy: Asymmetrical Bento Grid (TETRIS MODE) and wide overlapping layouts. Avoid standard Vercel blocks.
marketing_pages.spacing: Generous. Use py-24 or py-32 for sections. gap-8 or gap-12 for grids.
marketing_pages.hero: Full viewport height (100vh). Absolute positioning for background imagery with parallax scroll effects. Floating glassmorphism booking card.

admin_dashboard.strategy: High Density Grid. Strict hierarchy, sharp edges, and high contrast for functional beauty.
admin_dashboard.spacing: Tight padding (p-4 to p-6). gap-4 or gap-6 for metrics cards.
admin_dashboard.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar, glassmorphism dark theme, cyan accents on active states.

landing_page.hero: Parallax background image of luxury car. Cinzel massive headline 'L'EXCELLENCE AUTOMOBILE'. CTA button with cyan glow.
landing_page.vehicle_showcase: Bento grid or Swiper slider with advanced hover zoom images. Cards have 1px cyan-tinted borders.
landing_page.process_steps: Staggered layout. 3 steps: 1. Choix du véhicule, 2. Dossier & Validation, 3. Livraison VIP. Use glowing line connecting steps.
landing_page.leasing_form: Glassmorphism modal or embedded section. Dark inputs with cyan focus rings.
landing_page.appointment: Embedded Calendly placeholder. Surrounded by deep dark blue gradients.
landing_page.contact: Massive footer. Generous spacing. Elegant Cinzel typography for contact details.

admin_dashboard.vehicle_crud: Data table (Shadcn) showing all vehicles, price, status. 'Add Vehicle' opens a drawer/modal.
admin_dashboard.cms_editor: Forms to edit hero text, process descriptions. Real-time preview if possible.
admin_dashboard.requests_viewer: List of leasing requests with status toggles (Pending, Approved, Rejected).

motion_and_animations.scroll_reveal: Fade up with blur: initial opacity-0 blur-md translate-y-8, whileInView opacity-100 blur-0 translate-y-0. duration 0.8s.
motion_and_animations.parallax: Use framer-motion useScroll and useTransform on background image Y-axis for smooth depth effect.
motion_and_animations.micro_interactions: Buttons scale down slightly on active (scale: 0.98). Cyan border glows intensely on hover.
motion_and_animations.stagger_children: Use variants in framer-motion to stagger vehicle cards loading by 0.1s.

components_strategy.html_tailwind: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layouts, Hero, Process Steps, Bento Grids.
components_strategy.shadcn_ui: Use Shadcn strictly for interactive logic: Forms, Inputs, Selects, Dialogs (for Leasing Form), Data Tables (Admin), Tabs.
components_strategy.overrides: All Shadcn components must be customized to dark mode. No generic gray borders. Use #071A1F and #22D3EE heavily for component states.

hero_background.description: Black Mercedes Benz AMG on road. Perfect for cinematic parallax hero.

vehicle_1.description: Black Porsche 911 on dock. Use for vehicle grid.

vehicle_2.description: Stylish McLaren supercar parked in futuristic garage.

process_section.description: Black car with open door. Represents handover / VIP delivery.

textures.description: Dark blue cracked glass texture. Use as overlay pattern with low opacity on backgrounds.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: NEVER center-align the main app container. Do not add '.App { text-align: center; }'.
All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case and role-based (e.g., data-testid='leasing-submit-button').
DO NOT use 'transition: all' in CSS or Tailwind. Always specify exact transition properties to avoid breaking transforms.
Avoid standard Vercel/Stripe component looks. Overwrite Shadcn styles to match the dark premium theme.
Do not use complete transparent backgrounds for overlays, sticky headers, or dropdowns. Always use a blur and tint, e.g., bg-[#071A1F]/80 backdrop-blur-xl.
Use French text ONLY. Placeholder text must be in French.
Grid children MUST be direct children. If using Framer Motion on a grid item, make the motion.div the direct child of the grid.
Never use AI assistant emojis in the UI.
Prioritize optical alignment over geometric alignment (e.g., adjust padding for icons inside buttons).
Ensure hover states explicitly declare text colors (e.g., hover:bg-[#22D3EE] hover:text-[#071A1F]).
Components MUST use named exports, Pages MUST use default exports.
